headline: Scotiabank Raises its Price Target on American Electric (AEP) to $140
summary: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 6, 2026, Scotiabank raised its price target on American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) to $140 from $131 previously and maintained a Sector Perform rating on the shares.
